heading: Goschen vs Goulburn Weir — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goschen, Victoria and Goulburn Weir, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Goulburn Weir has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Goschen (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goschen or Goulburn Weir safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goschen has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Goulburn Weir scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goschen scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Goulburn Weir scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goschen or Goulburn Weir?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Goulburn Weir has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
